rationale: Acting on Review 2 edits the sole non-`simp only` use (Deck.lean:73 `by simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]`) to an explicit `simp only` form or direct Iff.intro, making the proof consistent with every other lemma in the diff (e.g. mapsTo_fiber) and removing an implicit default simp-set dependency; Review 1 leaves the inconsistency untouched. This directly improves proof-quality maintainability without touching semantics or adding churn.
